mechanics.excerpt: It is almost impossible to identify sufferers of this extreme reaction before the onset of symptoms; but once diag- nosed, the patient barred from interstellar travel: INTEAPLANETARY AND INTERSTELLAR TRANBPORT DropShips and JumpShips transport Inner Sphere and Periphery citizens from worild to world_ the latter using the Kearny-Fuchida drive to ferry the former across light-years of space The KF drive allowed humankind to spread far beyond Terra and ever since has helped knit the sprawling vistas of colonized space together JumpShips and the Kearny-Fuchlda Drive From the Abridged Encyclopedia Galactica, Universal Press 3062 Though small refinements have been made t0 the KF drive since the first starship "jump' in 2107_ the underlying princi ples remain true to the theories put forward by Kearny ad Fuchida in 2018 In the simplest terms_ ship with KF drive can instantly travel to another point up to thirty light-years away: Of course, severa conditions limit this form of travel.
